description_long: This is a robust, antique-style metal vase with a domed lid and a prominent, ornate handle. The body is bulbous with a wide, flared midsection, decorated with intricate floral and geometric relief patterns. The lid features a small finial and a hinge mechanism, suggesting it can be opened. The surface has a weathered, dark patina, indicating age and exposure, with some areas showing lighter wear. The base is rounded and slightly raised, providing stability. The overall craftsmanship and decorative motifs suggest it could serve as a historical or ceremonial vessel in an urban park or public square.
description: A heavy, antique metal vase with a domed lid, ornate handle, and intricate relief patterns, finished in a weathered dark patina.
description_view_0: Front view shows the domed lid, ornate handle, and detailed floral reliefs on the body and neck.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the robust handle and the hinge mechanism on the lid, with more visible wear on the surface.
description_view_2: Rear angled view emphasizes the curvature of the handle and the rounded, decorated base.
description_view_3: Back view displays the continuous floral band around the neck and the symmetry of the decorative motifs.
